subject: Human Resources
title: The Role of the HR Professional
description: A short lesson to help you apply The Role of the HR Professional.

hook.text: An HR professional's phone rings: a manager wants to fire someone, an employee reports harassment, payroll is wrong.

buildup.text: HR professionals juggle recruiting, compliance, conflict resolution, benefits, and training—often all in one day.

discovery.text: The role requires empathy and objectivity in equal measure—caring for people while protecting the organization.

twist.text: Many employees mistrust HR, believing it only serves the company. Great HR professionals bridge that gap.

climax.text: The best HR people are part counselor, part strategist, and part legal advisor—all at once.

punchline.text: HR serves the people and the business simultaneously.

quiz.question: What is the dual role of HR professionals?
options: Caring for employees while protecting the organization
Only protecting the company from lawsuits
